analysis_summary.regime_source: shared_config bearish + price action accelerating + advisory bearish
notable_events: BTC dropped $199 in 15min from $76,611 to $76,412 - accelerating toward $76K support
BCH -10.78% daily crash deepening - bounce at $377 fully failed, now $367.40 accelerating toward $348 floor
DOGE -6.14% continues as leading weakness indicator across all tracked pairs
No reversal candle on any pair - pure bear momentum with no buying support at any level
BCH $360 breakdown level only 2% away - would trigger paper short cascade
Weekend distribution pattern continuing into Sunday night - no weekend bounce as typical
BTC $76K break would confirm cascade to $75K - currently only 0.54% away

decisions.decision: TIGHTEN combo31 BTC short trail further
decisions.rationale: BTC dropped from $76,611 to $76,412 in 15min - short profit grew from +$527 to +$726. Previous trail at $76,800 reduce / $77,200 close now too loose. New trail: reduce 25% at $76,600 (tightened from $76,800), full close at $76,900 (tightened from $77,200). Profit protection is paramount as BTC accelerates into support.
decisions.pnl_impact_if_executed: protects +$726 vs risking 100% pullback to $77,138 entry

decisions.rationale: ETH short +$11 profit improving. SOL short +$8.65 (6.76% ROI). Both tracking BTC downside. No exit signal. ETH $2,091 support approaching - add 0.3x on breakdown.

decisions.decision: HOLD futures_paper ETH short - now in profit
decisions.rationale: ETH short improved from -$16.69 to +$3.12 - first time in profit. Downtrend intact. Add 0.3x if $2,091 breaks at $2,080 with $2,105 stop.
Bearish momentum accelerating - lowered meanrevert oversold from 20 to 18, rsi_meanrev oversold from 15 to 13. Catastrophic risk to longs in this environment. Wait mode correct - no change to action.

decisions.decision: NO live positions - dry powder preserved
decisions.rationale: Futures wallet $46.75 + spot $276.45 = $323.20 total live equity. Bearish cascade environment means any long is catastrophic risk. Futures wallet too small for meaningful short position. Stay flat.

decisions.decision: UPDATE BCH short trigger - $360 breakdown imminent
decisions.rationale: BCH at $367.40, only 2% from $360 breakdown trigger. Stop tightened from $385 to $382. Target $348 initial (today's low), $335 if BTC cascades. First trigger (BTC $76K + BCH below $375) is partially met - BCH is below $375 but BTC still above $76K.

decisions.decision: COMBO31 add trigger set for BTC $76K break
decisions.rationale: If BTC breaks $76,200, add 0.05x at $75,800 target $74,000 with $76,200 stop. Stop-loss at $76,200 ensures max loss capped at +$400 against the position of +$726 profit, net profit floor of +$326 after reversal.
decisions.pnl_impact_if_executed: scales into strengthening bear trend with protected downside via tight stop

decisions.rationale: No weekend bounce on any pair - unusual for crypto. Typically weekends have low-volume bounces. This is distribution without accumulation. Suggests large players are distributing into any bid. Potential gap-down at Monday open.
decisions.pnl_impact_if_executed: watching for Monday open gap risk
